page.title: Marbella Luxury Car Show 2026: Yacht Pairing Guide

data.meta_description: Pair supercars with yachts at the Marbella Luxury Car Show 2026. See which of our 27 boats matches each marque – from €749/2h. Book your charter now.
data.summary: The Marbella Luxury Car Show 2026 returns to Puerto Banús, and we’ve paired every supercar marque with the perfect yacht from our fleet. From €749/2h, you can combine horsepower on land with sea-going style.
key_facts: Event dates: 28–31 May 2026 at Puerto Banús
19 yachts available for charter during the show
All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks & IVA
Mangusta 80 (€4,719/4h) includes a free jet ski
Boats depart from Puerto Banús – steps from the show
Pair a Ferrari with a Ferretti 94 or a Lamborghini with a Pershing 46

faq.q: When is the Marbella Luxury Car Show 2026?
faq.a: The show runs from 28 to 31 May 2026, typically held along the Paseo Marítimo in Puerto Banús. Exact timings are confirmed closer to the date.

faq.q: Can I charter a yacht on the same day as the car show?
faq.a: Yes – all our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, so you can step off the show floor and onto the boat. We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, especially during the event.

faq.q: Which yacht pairs best with a Ferrari?
faq.a: The Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) mirrors Ferrari’s blend of luxury and performance. Its spacious flybridge and 26-knot cruise suit the brand perfectly. Alternatively, the Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax) offers sporty lines at €749/2h.

faq.q: Is there a yacht that matches the Lamborghini Aventador?
faq.a: Absolutely – the Pershing 46. With its aggressive silhouette and 40-knot top speed, it’s the nautical equivalent of an Aventador. Departs Puerto Banús, 10 pax, from €749/2h.

faq.q: What about a Rolls-Royce or Bentley?
faq.a: The Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) or the Maiora 26m (26m, 12 pax) both offer the same opulent, hand-finished interiors and silent cruising you’d expect from a Phantom or Flying Spur.

faq.q: Can I bring my own car to the show and then board a yacht?
faq.a: Yes – parking in Puerto Banús is limited but available. Many guests leave their cars at the marina and head straight to the boat. We can advise on the nearest parking when you book.

faq.q: Do you offer private transfers from the show to the yacht?
faq.a: Not directly, but Puerto Banús is compact – the show area is a 2-minute walk from our berths. If you need assistance with luggage or provisions, just let us know via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

data.body_html:
The Marbella Luxury Car Show 2026 returns to Puerto Banús from 28–31 May, bringing together the world’s most exclusive supercars, hypercars, and classic collectibles. But the experience doesn’t end on the tarmac – with our fleet of 19 yachts departing from the same marina, you can pair your favourite marque with a boat that matches its spirit, style, and speed. Whether you’re a Ferrari fanatic or a Bentley connoisseur, this guide matches each car brand to the perfect yacht charter – from €749/2h.

Ferrari → Ferretti 94 (€749/2h – €2,299/8h)

Ferrari stands for Italian craftsmanship, V12 drama, and timeless design. The Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) is its nautical counterpart – hand-finished interiors, a 26-knot cruise, and a flybridge that feels like an open-top Scuderia. Departs Puerto Banús. Browse all Marbella yacht charters.

Lamborghini → Pershing 46 (€749/2h – €2,299/8h)

Lamborghini’s sharp angles and savage acceleration are mirrored by the Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax). With a top speed of 40 knots and aggressive lines, this boat turns heads like an Aventador. Perfect for a 2-hour blast to Cala del Faro.

Rolls-Royce → Maiora 26m (pricing on request)

Rolls-Royce whispers luxury. The Maiora 26m (26m, 12 pax) does the same – silent cruising, leather sofas, and a sun deck that rivals the Goodwood Phantom’s rear cabin. Ideal for a sunset cruise past the Golden Mile.

Porsche → Mangusta 80 (€4,719/4h, jet ski included)

Porsche balances precision with usability. The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) offers the same – open-plan layout, 30-knot cruise, and a free jet ski for waterborne equivalent of a 911’s launch control. Available in grey or white variants.

Aston Martin → Azimut 58 Flybridge (pricing on request)

Aston Martin’s grand touring ethos – power with elegance – is captured by the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax). Cruise at 24 knots to Estepona or Sotogrande in air-conditioned comfort. Departs Puerto Banús.

McLaren → K80 (pricing on request)

McLaren’s carbon-fibre monocoques and track-focused performance find a match in the K80 (24m, 12 pax). This yacht is built for speed and agility – expect a 35-knot top end and a layout that prioritises driving (or rather, piloting) pleasure.

Bentley → Ferretti 94 (€749/2h – €2,299/8h)

Bentley’s wood, leather, and effortless torque are echoed by the Ferretti 94. Its flybridge is the equivalent of a Continental GT’s cabin – spacious, quiet, and impeccably finished. Book for a full-day charter to Cabopino.

Bugatti → Canados 86 (pricing on request)

Bugatti is about extreme engineering and rarity. The Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax) is one of the fastest planing yachts in its class – 38 knots, carbon-fibre hard top, and a price tag that matches its exclusivity. Departs Puerto Banús.

How to Book Your Yacht for the Car Show

All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, just metres from the show. Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €749/2h – €2,299/8h. Tier B (Mangusta 80 variants) is €4,719 minimum 4h with a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request – contact us via WhatsApp. Every charter includes skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and IVA. View the full fleet.

Frequently asked questions

When is the Marbella Luxury Car Show 2026?

The show runs from 28 to 31 May 2026, typically held along the Paseo Marítimo in Puerto Banús. Exact timings are confirmed closer to the date.

Can I charter a yacht on the same day as the car show?

Yes – all our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, so you can step off the show floor and onto the boat. We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, especially during the event.

Which yacht pairs best with a Ferrari?

The Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) mirrors Ferrari’s blend of luxury and performance. Its spacious flybridge and 26-knot cruise suit the brand perfectly. Alternatively, the Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax) offers sporty lines at €749/2h.

Is there a yacht that matches the Lamborghini Aventador?

Absolutely – the Pershing 46. With its aggressive silhouette and 40-knot top speed, it’s the nautical equivalent of an Aventador. Departs Puerto Banús, 10 pax, from €749/2h.

What about a Rolls-Royce or Bentley?

The Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) or the Maiora 26m (26m, 12 pax) both offer the same opulent, hand-finished interiors and silent cruising you’d expect from a Phantom or Flying Spur.

Can I bring my own car to the show and then board a yacht?

Yes – parking in Puerto Banús is limited but available. Many guests leave their cars at the marina and head straight to the boat. We can advise on the nearest parking when you book.

Do you offer private transfers from the show to the yacht?

Not directly, but Puerto Banús is compact – the show area is a 2-minute walk from our berths. If you need assistance with luggage or provisions, just let us know via WhatsApp.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.
